Emily Nguyen
High School Teacher — Mathematics, New York, NY
emily.nguyen@example.com | 555-201-3011 | linkedin.com/in/emily-nguyen-edu

SUMMARY
Certified high school mathematics teacher with 8 years of classroom experience.
Skilled in curriculum design, differentiated instruction, and data-driven
assessment to raise student outcomes in diverse urban classrooms.

EXPERIENCE
High School Mathematics Teacher — Eastside Public High School (2018–present)
- Teach Algebra II and Precalculus to 120+ students; design curriculum and daily
  lesson plans aligned to state standards.
- Use differentiated instruction and formative assessment to support diverse
  learners, raising passing rates on state exams by 22%.
- Develop IEP accommodations with special-education staff and lead the math
  department's curriculum review and classroom-management initiatives.

Middle School Teacher — Harborview Academy (2016–2018)
- Taught 7th-grade math; created lesson plans, assessments, and after-school
  tutoring programs to improve literacy and numeracy.

SKILLS
Teaching, curriculum, curriculum design, lesson planning, classroom management,
differentiated instruction, assessment, instruction, pedagogy, student outcomes,
IEP, state standards, education, tutoring, learning outcomes

CERTIFICATION & EDUCATION
New York State Teaching Certification, Mathematics (7–12)
M.S. Education, Teachers College, Columbia University, 2016
B.A. Mathematics, SUNY Binghamton, 2014
